description_long: This is a sleek, elongated spoon with a gently curved, oval bowl and a straight, narrow handle. The surface appears smooth and highly reflective, suggesting it is made of polished metal, likely stainless steel. The handle tapers slightly as it meets the bowl, providing a comfortable grip for the user. The bowl is shallow and broad, ideal for scooping liquids or soft foods. The overall design is minimalist and functional, with no visible embellishments or patterns. Its dark, uniform coloration gives it a modern and utilitarian appearance.
description: A polished, dark metallic spoon with a smooth, oval bowl and a straight, narrow handle. The surface is highly reflective and sleek.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow handle leading to the rounded, oval bowl, with the bowl facing directly forward.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the shallow depth of the bowl and the straight, flat handle extending horizontally.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full width of the bowl and the handle extending away from the viewer.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the profile of the bowl and handle from the other side.
attribute_orientation: bowl facing upward, handle extending downward or to the side
attribute_contextual_placement: resting flat on a surface or nested with other utensils
attribute_proximity_to_other_objects: often placed next to forks and knives or stacked with similar spoons
